nasb.text: And they all ate and were satisfied, and they picked up what was left over of the broken pieces, seven large baskets full.

esv.text: And they all ate and were satisfied. And they took up seven baskets full of the broken pieces left over.

cnv.text: 大家都吃了，並且吃飽了。他們把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了七個大籃子。

ccb.text: 大家都吃了，并且吃饱了，剩下的零碎装满了七个筐子。

csbs.text: 大家都吃了，并且吃饱了。然后，他们把剩下的碎块收拾起来，装满了七个筐子。
